verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a single-pass TM protein with an extracellular immunoglobulin-like domain on the outer leaflet. It does reach the outer face of the plasma membrane via its own membrane anchor and is documented on sperm-surface where it mediates JUNO binding. However, expression is strictly restricted to male germ cells and sperm — a narrow reproductive lineage. Surface accessibility is tissue / cell-type restricted to the germline, not broadly accessible in somatic contexts.
